name: Verso
desc: Extensible interactive notebook platform for .NET. Every built-in feature, from the C# kernel to the dashboard layout, is an extension built on the same public…
descFull: Extensible interactive notebook platform for .NET. Every built-in feature, from the C# kernel to the dashboard layout, is an extension built on the same public interfaces available to third-party authors. Runs in VS Code and the browser.
